analysis.summary_en: Split tape: TSMC leads TAIEX recovery (+1.46%) on strong TSM ADR (+5.26%), but the rest of semiconductors are bleeding — UMC (2303) -6.36%, MediaTek (2454) -3.49%, Largan (3008) -3.87%, Chipbond/Quanta (2382) -3.88%. Sharp divergence suggests a TSMC-specific catalyst (likely earnings/AI capex readthrough) rather than broad risk-on. Foxconn (2317) up on AI server/Apple chain. Smartphone and non-AI semi weakness weighing. EWT +3.18% overnight but local TAIEX -0.43% — ADR crowd more bullish than Taipei.
analysis.summary_zh: 分歧盤面:台積電(2330)領漲+1.46%,受ADR大漲5.26%帶動,但其他半導體族群重挫——聯電(2303)-6.36%、聯發科(2454)-3.49%、大立光(3008)-3.87%、廣達(2382)-3.88%。分歧顯示為台積電個股利多(可能財報/AI資本支出解讀)而非全面risk-on。鴻海(2317)因AI伺服器/蘋果供應鏈走強。手機與非AI半導體拖累大盤。EWT海外+3.18%但加權指數-0.43%,ADR比台北投資人更樂觀。

key_stories.headline_en: Top-4 CSP 2026 capex revised up to US$660B — record cloud infra spending
key_stories.headline_zh: 四大雲端服務商2026年資本支出上修至6,600億美元,創新高
key_stories.analysis_en: This is the likely driver behind TSMC's ADR gap-up and Foxconn strength. Hyperscaler capex at $660B is meaningfully above prior consensus and flows directly to TSMC (CoWoS, N3/N2) and AI server ODMs. Explains why TSMC and Foxconn are green while commodity semis (UMC, MediaTek) are red — the spend is narrow, AI-concentrated, not a broad semi cycle lift.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 這應是台積電ADR跳空及鴻海走強的主要推手。6,600億美元的超大規模資本支出明顯高於先前市場共識,直接流向台積電(CoWoS、N3/N2)及AI伺服器ODM廠。這解釋了為何台積電與鴻海上漲,但成熟製程/手機相關(聯電、聯發科)下跌——錢集中在AI,非半導體全面回溫。

key_stories.headline_en: UMC (2303) crashes -6.36% on heavy volume despite UMC ADR +3.08%
key_stories.headline_zh: 聯電重挫6.36%且成交爆量,但ADR反漲3.08%
key_stories.analysis_en: 9.44% ADR-local divergence is extreme. Volume 231M shares suggests local panic/foreign sell. Possible mechanisms: (1) leaked weak Q1 guidance or mature-node utilization warning ahead of earnings, (2) China smartphone shipments falling below 600M (DigiTimes) hits UMC's mature-node mix, (3) sympathy dumping on MediaTek/Novatek weakness. ADR didn't see the news yet — watch for overnight ADR catch-down or local bounce. Falsifier: if UMC releases reassuring guidance or ADR holds gains tonight, the local move was overdone panic.
key_stories.analysis_zh: ADR與本地背離達9.44%極端水準。成交量2.31億張顯示本地恐慌/外資賣壓。可能原因:(1)法說前漏出Q1成熟製程稼動率或財測偏弱訊息;(2)中國手機出貨跌破6億支(DigiTimes)衝擊成熟製程;(3)聯發科/聯詠走弱的同類拋售。ADR尚未反映此消息——觀察今晚ADR是否補跌或本地反彈。證偽條件:若聯電釋出安撫性指引或ADR今晚守穩,則本地賣壓屬過度恐慌。

key_stories.headline_en: MediaTek (2454) -3.49% and Largan (3008) -3.87% on China smartphone weakness
key_stories.headline_zh: 聯發科-3.49%、大立光-3.87%,受中國手機疲弱拖累
key_stories.analysis_en: China smartphone shipments to drop below 600M in 2026 — lowest since 2021. Directly hits MediaTek (SoC exposure), Largan (lens, Apple+Android), and Quanta (2382 — though 2382 is more notebook/server ODM, may be sympathy). Move is rational given fundamental readthrough. Falsifier: if a major China OEM (Xiaomi/Oppo) issues upbeat Q2 guidance within a week, this selloff reverses.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 中國手機2026年出貨跌破6億支,為2021年以來最低。直接衝擊聯發科(SoC)、大立光(鏡頭,蘋果+安卓)、廣達(2382,雖主要為NB/伺服器ODM,可能同類拖累)。跌幅基於基本面合理反映。證偽條件:若小米/OPPO等中國品牌未來一週釋出Q2正面展望,此賣壓將反轉。

key_stories.headline_en: TSMC ADR-local divergence 3.8% — local likely to catch up
key_stories.headline_zh: 台積電ADR與本地背離3.8%,本地可能補漲
key_stories.analysis_en: TSM +5.26% vs 2330.TW +1.46%. Local hit intraday high of 2135 (~4% up) before fading to +1.46%, suggesting profit-taking or index-level risk-off capping it. With CSP capex upgrade as backdrop, 2330 likely has further upside tomorrow if overseas momentum holds. Falsifier: TSM ADR fades overnight or new China/tariff headline hits.
key_stories.analysis_zh: TSM ADR漲5.26% vs 本地2330僅漲1.46%。本地盤中觸及2135高點(約+4%)後回落至+1.46%,顯示有獲利了結或指數層面風險壓制。CSP資本支出上修為背景下,若海外動能延續,2330明日有補漲空間。證偽條件:TSM今晚ADR回吐,或出現新的中國/關稅利空消息。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Extreme divergence. Local panic (-6.36% on 231M volume) not reflected in ADR (+3.08%). Either ADR catches down tonight (bearish read: local saw something first, earnings-related leak) or local over-reacted and bounces. Watch UMC earnings calendar and tonight's ADR close.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 背離極端。本地恐慌(-6.36%,成交量2.31億)未反映於ADR(+3.08%)。今晚ADR可能補跌(偏空解讀:本地先知情,可能財報相關走漏)或本地過度反應將反彈。追蹤聯電法說時程與今晚ADR收盤。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: ADR significantly ahead. If CSP capex story holds, 2330 likely plays catch-up tomorrow. Intraday high of 2135 already showed buying interest; local sellers used the pop to trim.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: ADR明顯領先。若CSP資本支出題材延續,2330明日可能補漲。盤中2135高點已顯示買盤,本地賣方則藉機減碼。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: 3504 (Yageo-related/小型股) down -6.92% locally but HIMX ADR only -0.77%. Looks like local small-cap derisking rather than a Himax-specific catalyst. Lower conviction signal.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 3504本地跌6.92%但HIMX ADR僅跌0.77%。看似本地小型股去風險化而非奇景個股利空。訊號強度較低。
